purpose: Defines the evidence packet that must be satisfied before AETHERUS can truthfully cross from staged governance product surface into operational use.

required_evidence_classes.description: Captured real input and output artifacts bound to a specific governance trace.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim operational artifact evidence or operational release support.

required_evidence_classes.description: Generated hash for each real input artifact used by a governed trace.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim operational input integrity or replayable input verification.

required_evidence_classes.description: Generated hash for each real output artifact produced by a governed trace.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim operational output integrity or release-artifact verification.

required_evidence_classes.description: Binding between input/output artifacts, generated hashes, and the trace record.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim operational artifact lineage or hash-bound trace evidence.

required_evidence_classes.description: Durable trace storage with schema and retention boundaries.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim operational trace persistence.

required_evidence_classes.description: Append-only write behavior for trace and audit events.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim persistent production audit-ledger behavior.

required_evidence_classes.description: Verification of trace-event continuity through previous-hash binding.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim operational trace-integrity verification.

required_evidence_classes.description: Server-side validation and signed validation result artifacts.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim backend-validated operational governance infrastructure.

required_evidence_classes.description: Authenticated actor or reviewer identity available for trace attribution.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim authenticated workflow or actor-bound operational review.

required_evidence_classes.description: Binding between authenticated actor identity and each trace action.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim operational reviewer attribution or actor-accountable trace records.

required_evidence_classes.description: Execution log that records enough context to reproduce the governed run.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim operational execution evidence.

required_evidence_classes.description: Structured run record tying deterministic inputs, gates, verdicts, and replay context together.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim replayable operational governance runs.

required_evidence_classes.description: Test result artifact bound to release-gate evidence.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim operational release-gate test evidence.

required_evidence_classes.description: Validator report artifact that records contract, schema, and release-gate validation results.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim validation-backed operational release eligibility.

required_evidence_classes.description: Security review record covering threat model, runtime boundary, and operational attachment risk.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim operational readiness, production safety review, or deployment approval.

required_evidence_classes.description: Storage and audit retention model for operational trace and evidence records.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim operational audit retention or production evidence retention.

required_evidence_classes.description: Explicit bounded-runtime boundary for model execution, adapter execution, and safety gates.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim live AI execution or operational runtime execution.

required_evidence_classes.description: Operational record for freeze, escalation, and review-state transitions.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim operational escalation workflow or freeze enforcement.

required_evidence_classes.description: Operational release-decision record tied to actor identity, validator reports, and release-gate evidence.
required_evidence_classes.claim_effect_if_missing: AETHERUS may not claim operational release authority or production release decision support.

claim_gates.claim: AETHERUS may currently be described as a staged governance product surface.
claim_gates.rule: Allowed only with static, deterministic, non-operational boundary discipline.

claim_gates.claim: AETHERUS may currently be described as exposing deterministic governance interface logic and operational evidence requirements.
claim_gates.rule: Allowed only when evidence requirements are framed as pending construction targets.

claim_gates.claim: AETHERUS may not currently be described as operationally deployed.
claim_gates.rule: Requires every required evidence class to be implemented and validated before this claim can change.

claim_gates.claim: AETHERUS may not currently be described as executing live AI.
claim_gates.rule: Requires runtime_execution_boundary and model-execution safety gates before this claim can change.

claim_gates.claim: AETHERUS may not currently be described as maintaining a persistent production audit ledger.
claim_gates.rule: Requires persistent trace storage, append-only semantics, hash-chain verification, and retention model before this claim can change.

claim_gates.claim: AETHERUS may not currently be described as backend-validated operational governance infrastructure.
claim_gates.rule: Requires backend validation, signed validator reports, and operational evidence packet validation before this claim can change.

claim_gates.claim: AETHERUS may not currently be described as customer-ready, tenant-isolated, or production SaaS.
claim_gates.rule: This contract does not define customer workspace, tenant isolation, or SaaS readiness evidence.

claim_gates.claim: Operational use is a legitimate future threshold event once the required evidence classes are implemented and validated.
claim_gates.rule: The threshold is defined here; this pass does not satisfy it.

relationship_to_product_negative_space_b.relationship: This contract converts negative-space construction targets into required operational-use evidence classes.

validation_requirements: All required top-level fields must exist.
All required evidence classes must exist exactly once.
Every required evidence class must remain in a non-complete current_status until a future implementation pass changes the threshold truthfully.
operational_use_threshold_status must remain threshold_not_met for this version.
current_claim_status must not imply current operational use.
Every major prohibited current claim must remain listed in disallowed_claims_until_threshold_met.
The contract must state that operational use is a legitimate future threshold event.
The contract must state that this pass introduced no backend, database, persistence, ledger, auth, runtime execution, or model API implementation.

non_implementation_boundary.boundary_statement: This pass defines the operational-use threshold and introduces no backend, database, persistence, ledger, auth, runtime execution, model API, public NEXUS, Palisade, Weave, billing, monitoring, tenant isolation, customer workspace, production SaaS, or operational-use claim.
